meaning: n.帕西人(公元8世纪为逃避穆斯林迫害由波斯移居印度),印度拜火教徒
examples: Its wealth was created largely by Gujarati, Rajasthani and Parsee traders.
Drabdump rose from her knees content, like a Parsee priestess who had duly paid her morning devotions to her deity.
I don't know, officer, 'replied the Parsee, listening attentively to a confused murmur which came through the thick branches.
At the same time, he became locked in a fierce battle with his business rivals, most notably Nusli Wadia, a textile tycoon and scion of a powerful Parsee family.
